title: cyperus nduru
intro: Cyperus nduru, also known as papyrus sedge, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus nduru include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. Herbal preparations of Cyperus nduru include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
